# Prospector Labs — Glass Energy API

> US energy infrastructure data platform. 47,000+ interconnection queue projects, 5.4M distributed generation installations, 6,593 developer profiles, ITC/PTC tax credit calculations, and deal sourcing for investors.

## API

- Base URL: https://prospector-platform-production.up.railway.app
- Docs: https://prospector-platform-production.up.railway.app/docs
- OpenAPI: https://prospector-platform-production.up.railway.app/openapi.json
- Auth: Free API key via POST /api-keys/register (50 requests/month free)

## MCP Server

- Install: pip install prospector-energy-mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/OwenCoonahan/prospector-energy-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/prospector-energy-mcp/
- 31 tools for Claude, GPT, and other AI agents

## Key Endpoints

- GET /projects — Search 47,000+ interconnection queue projects
- GET /projects/{id} — Full project detail with enrichment
- GET /deals/itc — ITC-eligible investment opportunities
- GET /deals/itc/summary — Aggregate ITC deal pipeline
- GET /deals/{id}/sheet — 1-page HTML deal sheet
- GET /investable — Pre-screened investable projects (scored 0-100)
- GET /investable/summary — Investability pipeline stats
- GET /developers/search — Search 6,593 developer profiles
- GET /developers/{id} — Developer track record + portfolio
- GET /tax-credits/calculate — ITC/PTC calculator with IRA bonuses
- GET /domestic-content/{id} — Domestic content bonus eligibility
- GET /dg/projects — Search 5.4M distributed generation installations
- GET /lmp/daily — Locational marginal prices (6 ISOs)
- GET /capacity/prices — Capacity market auction results
- GET /generators — EIA generator inventory (26K+)
- GET /technology-costs — NREL ATB cost projections
- GET /grid/turbines — 75K+ wind turbines
- GET /grid/transmission — 95K+ transmission lines
- GET /grid/substations — 64K+ substations
- GET /export/projects — CSV export (up to 50K)
- POST /query — Read-only SQL against 9 databases

## Data Coverage

- Interconnection queues: PJM, MISO, ERCOT, CAISO, NYISO, SPP, ISO-NE, West, Southeast
- Distributed generation: 27 states, 16 programs (LBNL TTS, NY-SUN, NJ, CA, IL, MA, FL, NC)
- Market data: LMP (6 ISOs), capacity prices, fuel prices, technology costs
- Grid infrastructure: wind turbines, transmission lines, substations
- Tax credits: ITC/PTC with energy community, low-income, domestic content bonuses
- Developers: 6,593 profiles, tier classification, capital needs assessment
